name: Lam Soon (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Lam Soon (Thailand) Public Company Limited operates a crushing mill and a palm oil refinery in Thailand. The company offers cooking oil, margarine, shortening, special fat, and bakery ingredients comprising cocoa powder; and coconut, soybean, sunflower seed, corn, camellia, olive, blended canola, sunflower, pure canola, and rice bran oil. It also provides fruits and vegetables packed in can, pouch, and glass containers; fruit juices and juice drinks; coffee and miscellaneous beverages; and sauces and seasonings. In addition, it is involved in the oil palm plantation activities; holding of concessions to use forest reserve land; and generation of electricity using biogases. The company was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
